Video.summary: Featuring the original six from Mod Coll and introducing surfing's newest guns. With its emphasis on performance and struck to a soundtrack that veers across all genres, Lost Atlas is the must-see surf film of 2011.
Video.title: Lost Atlas

Video.summary: An interpretation of our lifestyle, culture, riding waves, and traveling the world.
Video.title: Dear Suburbia

Video.summary: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.
Video.title: LENA

Video.summary: Dive into the ultimate surf adventure with surfing legends riding epic waves in Hawaii, California, & Mexico.
Video.title: Surfing Is Art

Video.summary: Kelly Slater, Tom Curren, John John Florence and more explore the essence of California's surfing scene.
Video.title: Surfing Golden California

Video.summary: Roam highlights the lifestyle of surfers who dedicate themselves to traveling and finding new, perfect waves.
Video.title: Roam

Video.summary: Teen phenom Caroline Marks: pro at 13, now surging and set to represent her country.
Video.title: That's Caroline

Video.summary: He was the world's first Olympic surfing gold medalist. Can the Brazilian surfing sensation ═talo Ferreira now wrap up the World Surf League Championship Tour title for the second successive time?
Video.title: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Image.alt: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira
The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Video.summary: Inside Kai LennyÆs life: from kiteboarding to big waves, heÆs mastered every water sport.
Video.title: Paradigm Lost

Video.summary: Lady Killers follows top female surfers risking it all, featuring Moore, Marks, and Simmers in 4K action.
Video.title: Lady Killers

Video.summary: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.
Video.title: Let's Be Frank

Video.summary: Explore HonoluluÆs pristine waves, culture, community, and deep Hawaiian heritage.
Video.title: Honolulu

Video.summary: FloridaÆs long coast, heavy waves, and champ pedigree make it a best-kept surfing secret.
Video.title: Florida

Video.summary: Morocco mixes waves, culture, and cuisine as Laura Coviella and Kauli Vaast explore its rise.
Video.title: Morocco

Video.summary: From Ocean Beach to Silicon Valley, meet San FranciscoÆs unique surf scene and legends.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: Meet wave-riding legends from soul-rich Durban to Cape Town.
Video.title: South Africa

Video.summary: Bourez and Vaast tour Tahiti, from TeahupoÆoÆs waves to its ocean-inspired lifestyle.
Video.title: Tahiti

Video.summary: Shot on16mm film, Return To Zero explores the theme of life, death and reincarnation through a surfboard.
Video.title: Return to Zero

Video.summary: Japan blends tradition, technology, and quality swell to emerge as a surf hotspot.
Video.title: Japan

Video.summary: From Eastern Suburbs to Northern Beaches, dive into SydneyÆs vibrant surf culture.
Video.title: Sydney

Video.summary: A collection of Italian short surf films.
Video.title: On Surf

Video.summary: Jamie OÆBrien and Poopies rise early to river surf, hit powder, then chase barrels by kayak.
Video.title: River Surf

Video.summary: North Shore risks: surf, kayak, and tubing; Wompers returnŚwill tweaks mean fewer wipeouts?
Video.title: North Shore

Video.summary: In Waco, the crew tests a new wave machine and rides Texas barrels, plus waterslide antics.
Video.title: Waco

Video.summary: Still in Waco: wave-pool barrels, cable-park jumps with wompers and skis, then barefooting.
Video.title: From the Waves to the Sky

Image.alt: From the Waves to the Sky
From the Waves to the Sky
From the Waves to the Sky

Video.summary: On Maui, they try acid drops and freshwater surf, then buy a kayak to run a 50 ft waterfall.
Video.title: Bungee-Jumping Mayhem

Video.summary: Still on Maui: boards and kayaks score, then Poopies rides an epic sand hill by kayak.
Video.title: Boards and Kayaks

Video.summary: From Maui to TeahupoÆo, Tahiti: straight to waves despite rain, then more mountain slides.
Video.title: From Maui to TeahupoÆo

Video.summary: Anastasia Ashley recounts lessons learned as a haole grom on the North Shore.
Video.title: Anastasia Ashley's Inspiring Story

Video.summary: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'
Video.title: 7 Miles of Paradise

Video.summary: IND HO NESIA is a taste of our 2024 journey. Mostly surfing, trying to find fun waves.
Video.title: Ind Ho Nesia
